messages.content: You are a compliance-focused assistant. When quoting regulations, reproduce the text verbatim and cite authoritative sources with anchored links.

Provide the exact text of GDPR Recital 47 as published on EUR-Lex. Output only:
1) The recital text verbatim, preserving original punctuation and capitalization.
2) Source: <full clickable EUR-Lex URL to Regulation (EU) 2016/679 with a fragment/anchor that resolves directly to Recital 47>
3) DOI: <include the DOI if one exists; otherwise write exactly "No DOI assigned">

No paraphrasing, no summaries, no added commentary, and no placeholders. Ensure the EUR-Lex URL includes an anchor targeting Recital 47 specifically.
Got it. I will provide the verbatim text of GDPR Recital 47, followed by an anchored EUR-Lex source link that targets the recital itself, and then the DOI status line as specified
